query: UPDATE blog_posts SET excerpt = 'While China''s export numbers dominate headlines, a quieter boom is reshaping tourism. Discover why authentic home dining experiences are becoming the new frontier of cultural exchange.' WHERE id = 'blog-1-china-export-boom';
